name: muzi-going-skills
description: Muzi Going 的 Claude skills 商店 — curated skills by Muzi Going Li

plugins.name: prompt-coach
plugins.description: 問對問題教練 — turns a vague, underspecified request into a Goal / Constraints / Obstacle breakdown, then produces a ready-to-use structured prompt.

plugins.name: multi-perspective-panel
plugins.description: 多角度組隊思考 — reviews any decision, plan, or open question from four independent thinking angles (critical/creative/communication/interaction), as a parallel panel or an adversarial red/blue team debate.

plugins.name: ai-roleplay-practice
plugins.description: AI 角色扮演練習夥伴 — sets up an interactive roleplay to rehearse difficult conversations with AI playing any persona you define, with structured feedback at the end.

plugins.name: futures-studies-analyst
plugins.description: 未來學研究方法分析器 — turns qualitative and trend data into rigorous futures-studies analysis organized by Inayatullah's Six Pillars: Delphi, CLA, scenario planning, environmental scanning, futures triangle/wheel, backcasting, Three Horizons, cross-impact analysis.

plugins.name: pdca-process-review
plugins.description: PDCA 流程檢視 — apply the Deming cycle (Plan-Do-Check-Act) to systematically review and improve any recurring process or way of working, with evidence-based Check and standardize-or-adjust Act.

plugins.name: agentic-dev-loop
plugins.description: 系統化開發工作流 — research → plan.md → implement → dual verify gates (security + UI/UX) → deploy. Orchestrates project-guardrails, web-security-reviewer, and ui-ux-deploy-reviewer into one repeatable, resumable, auditable loop.

plugins.name: project-guardrails
plugins.description: 連動禁區防護 — analyzes a codebase for 'change A, break B' high-risk zones (high fan-in modules, data contracts, deploy configs, external contracts, algorithmic cores) and writes guardrails into the project's CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: ui-ux-deploy-reviewer
plugins.description: 部署前 UI/UX 總體檢 — pre-deploy UI/UX review against 20 principles (Nielsen's 10 heuristics + interaction-psychology laws + accessibility), outputting severity-ranked issues, fixes, and a go/no-go checklist.

plugins.name: web-security-reviewer
plugins.description: 防禦性安全審查 — defensive security review of your own code (Apps Script, frontend, backend): vulnerabilities, data leakage, stress/performance risks, with a severity-ranked report plus corrected code.
